rules.name: force-unwrap
rules.message: Force unwrap (!) — crashes at runtime if the value is nil.
rules.fix_hint: Use optional binding (if let / guard let), nil-coalescing (??), or optional chaining (?.) instead.

rules.name: force-cast
rules.message: Force cast (as!) — crashes at runtime if the type doesn't match.
rules.fix_hint: Use conditional cast (as?) with optional binding instead.

rules.name: implicitly-unwrapped-optional
rules.message: Implicitly unwrapped optional — crashes if accessed while nil.
rules.fix_hint: Use a regular optional (?) with proper unwrapping, unless required for Interface Builder outlets.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to Keychain, environment variables, or a secure configuration; never embed in source.

rules.name: console-output
rules.message: print() in production code — use os_log or a structured logger instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with os_log, Logger (iOS 14+), or a project-specific logging framework.

rules.name: force-try
rules.message: Force try (try!) — crashes at runtime if the call throws.
rules.fix_hint: Use do/catch or try? with optional binding for recoverable errors.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named functions or use guard statements for early exits.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a static let constant with a descriptive name.

file_size._note: Lines of code. Test files get more room.

function_size._note: Detected via brace-counting heuristic, not grep.
